candidate_summary: Lipschitz-bounded safety-attractor S with gated 'airs-above-ground' high-amplitude excursions: per-layer spectral/Lipschitz penalty bounds gradient norm, quality-estimator gate g(s_context) permits temporary excursion outside conservative basin (creative response, nuanced refusal), excursion duration bounded by basin re-entry within T tokens. Recombines Lipschitz constraint + gating + duration bound.

results.name: ANTIBODY Robust Alignment Flat Loss Harmful Samples ICLR 2026 (2603.00498)

results.rationale: ANTIBODY targets flat-loss basin hardening — same basin-stability paradigm and similar safety-attractor concept, but lacks Lipschitz constraint, gated excursion, and duration-bounded re-entry. Same artefact family (safety basin) but different effect (flat-loss vs Lipschitz + gated excursion).

results.rationale: Architectural Lipschitz-controlled attention variants overlap on Lipschitz mechanism but theory-only — no gating, no excursion, no safety attractor application. Semantic hit on Lipschitz constraint alone.

results.rationale: Spectral normalization enforcing Lipschitz constants is core Lipschitz-bound training mechanism — strong match on Lipschitz artefact but no gated airs-above-ground excursion, no quality-estimator gate, no duration-bounded re-entry.

results.name: Cognitive Computation Alignment Human Agency Gated Modifications 2026
results.description: Immutable top-level safety constraints + cost-gated rate-limited constitution modifications.
keyword_matches: gated (matches 'airs-above-ground basin-excursion gated' and 'graduated-training quality-estimator gate')
results.rationale: Cost-gated rate-limited constitution modifications match the gating concept but for constitution edits, not for high-amplitude response excursion — no Lipschitz constraint, no safety-attractor basin formulation. Partial gating match only.

decision_rationale: Five of eight results clear the hit threshold (4 via semantic >=0.7, 3 via kw>=2; overlapping). The Lipschitz-bounded basin paradigm is densely covered by JaSMin (2507.07814), Pay Attention to Attention Distribution, Exact Attention Sensitivity, Approximation Theory Lipschitz Transformers, and Enforced Lipschitz Training — all targeting the same artefact (Lipschitz-constrained transformer). ANTIBODY covers safety-basin hardening. The candidate's three add-ons (gated airs-above-ground excursion, quality-estimator gate, duration-bounded re-entry) are not novel: cost-gated rate-limited modifications (Cognitive Computation 2026) cover the gating principle, and safety-aware probing covers quality-estimation gating. Recombination of well-known Lipschitz + gating is insufficient novelty under the basin-stability paradigm. FAIL.
